author: Amina Javed
purpose: Freelancing platform portfolio thumbnails (Upwork, Fiverr, etc.)

thumbnails.title: Zephyr — IoT Platform
thumbnails.description: Enterprise IoT platform managing smart AC systems with ASP.NET Web API, JWT RBAC, and MQTT integration for real-time remote control and automated scheduling.

thumbnails.title: DevPort — Cloud Portfolio App
thumbnails.description: Cloud web app showcasing user portfolios using ASP.NET Core, Blazor, EF Core, ASP.NET Identity, RESTful APIs, caching, and CI/CD pipeline deploying to Azure.

thumbnails.title: EventEase
thumbnails.description: Blazor WebAssembly event management app for browsing corporate and social events, registering with validated forms, and tracking attendance.

thumbnails.title: SecondChance — Exchange Platform
thumbnails.description: Node.js/MongoDB backend enabling users to exchange household items with secure RESTful APIs, JWT auth, Docker, Kubernetes, and IBM Cloud CI/CD.

thumbnails.title: Little Lemon — Reservation App
thumbnails.description: Full-stack restaurant reservation system with Django REST Framework backend, MySQL, Djoser auth, and React frontend with React Router.

thumbnails.title: GeoHealth Tracker
thumbnails.description: Single-page dashboard for exploring health facilities using live OpenStreetMap Overpass API data with Leaflet.js marker clustering and dynamic filtering.

thumbnails.title: E-commerce DevOps PoC
thumbnails.description: Modern Django MVT e-commerce PoC with full CI/CD pipeline via GitHub Actions and Docker, with automated testing and zero-downtime migration to Render.

thumbnails.title: WIP Analysis Tool
thumbnails.description: C# WinForms application using EPPlus and SQL Server to import Excel data, automate WIP calculations with data validation, and export accurate reports.

thumbnails.title: Tracket — Ticketing System
thumbnails.description: Ticketing management system using ASP.NET Core and EF Code-First with RBAC, JWT authentication, and Firebase push notifications for field service workflows.

thumbnails.title: TruckDestino — Fleet Management
thumbnails.description: Modernized legacy Fleet Management System from Silverlight/SOAP to RESTful APIs with full API documentation and data consistency enforcement.

thumbnails.title: QuickBooks IIF Generator
thumbnails.description: C# WinForms application automating conversion of SQL Server transactional data into QuickBooks IIF import files with Excel validation and duplicate detection.

thumbnails.title: GPMS — Garment Production
thumbnails.description: Garment Production & Packing Management System with WCF Service Layer, Entity Framework, and complex purchase order hierarchies for styles, colors, and sizes.

thumbnails.title: MEZBAN — Travel Platform (FYP)
thumbnails.description: Final Year Project MEAN stack accommodation platform with Google Places API for location-based recommendations and Stripe payment integration.

thumbnails.title: Tracko IS — Vehicle Tracker
thumbnails.description: Vehicle Tracker Invoicing System with Database-First RESTful APIs via ADO.NET, WinForms automation modules, and SIM lifecycle management.

thumbnails.title: Denim Labels Utility
thumbnails.description: WinForms desktop application using EPPlus and Crystal Reports to automate item-level denim label generation from Excel with multi-format PDF, Word, and Excel exports.

thumbnails.title: Warehouse Management System
thumbnails.description: Backend for a WMS using EF Code-First approach in .NET with RESTful APIs optimized for high-throughput warehouse operations and seamless data integration.

thumbnails.title: Terminal Management System
thumbnails.description: Maintenance and optimization of a critical .NET Framework desktop application focused on resolving legacy bugs, code optimization, and improving stability.

thumbnails.title: MMS — Meeting Room & Access Management
thumbnails.description: Meeting room booking system backend using ASP.NET Web API with multi-channel SMTP and WhatsApp notifications, QR code gate access validation, and N-Tier architecture.

thumbnails.title: Viva Scheduler
thumbnails.description: University web application to schedule student vivas and assign the nearest FAST NUCES campus as the viva center using PHP, MySQL, and Bootstrap.

thumbnails.title: COVID-19 Management System
thumbnails.description: Desktop application tracking COVID patients, hospitals, doctors, and wards with active, recovered, and death case statistics using C# and MySQL.
